name: Frozen Graham Custard
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease the freezing tray thoroughly.
2. Coat the sides and bottom of the tray with half the graham cracker crumbs; reserve the rest for topping.
3. Beat the eggs. Add sugar and vanilla, continuing to beat until the sugar is dissolved.
4. Add lemon juice to chilled milk and whip until stiff.
5. Fold in the egg mixture and pour into the freezing tray at once.
6. Sprinkle remaining cracker crumbs over the top.
7. Freeze until firm.
8. Cut into squares.
